targets.rawSql: WITH days AS (SELECT generate_series(date_trunc('day', now()) - interval '29 days', date_trunc('day', now()), interval '1 day') AS day) SELECT day AS time, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM messages WHERE role = 'user' AND created_at >= day AND created_at < day + interval '1 day') AS dau, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM messages WHERE role = 'user' AND created_at >= day - interval '6 days' AND created_at < day + interval '1 day') AS wau FROM days ORDER BY time;

WITH cohort AS (SELECT user_id, MIN(created_at::date) AS first_day FROM messages WHERE role = 'user' GROUP BY user_id), eligible AS (SELECT user_id FROM cohort WHERE first_day = current_date - 7), retained AS (SELECT DISTINCT m.user_id FROM messages m JOIN cohort c ON c.user_id = m.user_id WHERE m.role = 'user' AND c.first_day = current_date - 7 AND m.created_at::date = c.first_day + 7) SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM eligible) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 100.0 * (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM retained) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM eligible) END AS retention_d7_percent;

WITH per_user_day AS (SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS day, user_id, COUNT(*) AS messages FROM messages WHERE role = 'user' GROUP BY 1, 2) SELECT day AS time, AVG(messages) AS average, percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY messages) AS median FROM per_user_day GROUP BY day ORDER BY time;

SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS time, 100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE meta ->> 'modality' = 'voice') / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS voice_share_percent FROM messages WHERE role = 'user' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY time;
SELECT tool_name, COUNT(*) AS calls FROM tool_calls_log WHERE created_at >= now() - interval '7 days' GROUP BY tool_name ORDER BY calls DESC;
